mode.title: Mode
mode.description: full = discover pages then scrape them; discovery_only = only find page names; scrape_pages = scrape the pageNames list directly.

entityType.title: Entity Type
entityType.description: Type of Facebook entity to scrape: page (business/brand), group, or profile.

region.title: Region Preset
region.description: Region preset that controls the default locations and categories used during discovery.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: List of business/interest categories to discover. Overrides the region preset.

locations.title: Locations
locations.description: List of cities or regions to search. Overrides the region preset.

pageNames.title: Page Names (scrape_pages mode)
pageNames.description: List of Facebook page/group names or IDs to scrape directly. Used when mode = scrape_pages.

facebookEmail.title: Facebook Email
facebookEmail.description: Facebook account email for login. Required for scraping pages.

maxPages.title: Max Pages to Scrape
maxPages.description: Maximum number of pages/groups to scrape per run.

minLikes.title: Min Likes / Members
minLikes.description: Pages/groups below this threshold are skipped.

downloadThumbnails.title: Download Thumbnails
downloadThumbnails.description: If true, profile pictures, cover photos and post images are downloaded and stored in the KV store.

maxThumbnailsPerPage.title: Max Thumbnails Per Page
maxThumbnailsPerPage.description: Maximum number of content images to download per page.

googleApiKey.title: Google API Key
googleApiKey.description: Google Custom Search API key. Used to discover pages/groups via Google.

googleSearchEngineId.title: Google Search Engine ID (cx)
googleSearchEngineId.description: Google Custom Search Engine ID. Required when googleApiKey is set.

skipProxyValidation.title: Skip Proxy Validation
skipProxyValidation.description: Skip the proxy connectivity test before scraping. Useful when residential proxies are slow to validate.

dropProxyOnFailure.title: Drop Proxy on Validation Failure
dropProxyOnFailure.description: If true and proxy validation fails, run without a proxy. If false, continue with proxy anyway.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify proxy configuration. Use RESIDENTIAL group for best results with Facebook.
